zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hexstall於1442年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親William Hexstall34歲，母親Margaret Bromley34歲。她於1460年與Henry de Ferrers IV在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年在英國瓦維其可爾享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hexstall于1442年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲William Hexstall34岁，母亲Margaret Bromley34岁。她于1460年与Henry de Ferrers IV在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年在英国瓦維其可爾享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hexstall

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hexstall was born in 1442, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Hexstall, was 34 and her mother, Margaret Bromley, was 34. She married Henry de Ferrers IV in 1460, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1486, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in East Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Hexstall est née en 1442, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hexstall, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bromley, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Ferrers IV en 1460, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1486, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Hexstallが1442年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Hexstallは34歳，母Margaret Bromleyは34歳であった。1460年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでHenry de Ferrers IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hexstall(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hexstall(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bromley(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 워윅실르에서 Henry de Ferrers IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 워윅실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트 펙함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hexstall родилась в 1442 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Hexstall было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bromley, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Ferrers IV в 1460 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1486 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Hexstall nació en 1442, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Hexstall, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Bromley, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Henry de Ferrers IV en 1460, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1486, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
